subcodes.first_line: O Lord, my Lord! These servants, Thine abased thralls, have been chosen by Thee for Thy love, selected by Thee for Thy knowledge, and Thou hast accepted them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ربی ربی هولاء عبیدک الارقاء اجتبیتهم لحبک و انتخبتهم لعرفانک و ارتضیت لهم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @high station of learning, @service to others; to the Cause of God
